title: Welcome to Star Control
subtitle: Linux launcher for Star Citizen
desc.intro: Star Control is a community interface for the Star Citizen Linux ecosystem. This app was developed with AI assistance and would not be possible without the following projects:
desc.interfaceOnly: Star Control provides only a graphical interface for these tools. The real magic happens in the projects listed above.
desc.chooseDir: Choose where Star Citizen will be installed. This directory will hold the Wine prefix, runners, and game files. You need at least 100 GB of free space.
project.lugWikiDesc: The central resource for Star Citizen on Linux
modal.existingDesc: An RSI Launcher installation was found at the selected path. You can choose to:
modal.quickDesc: Only install/update DXVK and Wine components. Skip downloading the RSI Launcher. (Requires existing Runner)
modal.reinstallDesc: Complete fresh installation including downloading and installing the RSI Launcher.
